title: Social Media Super App
tagline: Multi-feature community platforms with messaging, content feed, rewards and monetization.
longDescription: A full-featured social super app: real-time messaging, content feed, short video, live streaming, creator monetization, in-app payments, rewards and discovery. Engineered to scale to millions of concurrent users with cross-border CDN and real-time backend.
iconSvg: <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="5" y="2" width="14" height="20" rx="2"/><path d="M12 18h.01"/></svg>

features.title: Real-time Messaging
features.desc: 1-on-1 and group chat with media, voice notes, read receipts and push notifications via WebSocket.

features.title: Content Feed & Discovery
features.desc: Personalised feed, hashtags, trending, follow graph and recommendation engine.

features.title: Live Streaming
features.desc: Cross-border live streaming with low-latency transcoding, gifts, comments and recording.

features.title: Creator Monetization
features.desc: Tipping, paid subscriptions, in-app purchases, virtual goods, withdrawal and KYC.

features.title: Rewards & Tasks
features.desc: Daily login, referral, badges, leaderboards and a tokenized rewards economy.

features.title: Cross-border CDN
features.desc: Edge caching, regional failover and adaptive streaming for users worldwide.

title: Loan Management System
tagline: End-to-end loan origination, credit scoring, approval workflow and repayment tracking.
longDescription: Production-grade loan management built for lenders, fintechs and micro-finance operators. Borrower onboarding, eKYC, AI credit scoring, approval workflow, disbursement, repayment and collections — with a full admin portal and regulatory reporting.
iconSvg: <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="2" y="5" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><line x1="2" y1="10" x2="22" y2="10"/></svg>

features.title: Application Portal
features.desc: Borrower onboarding with eKYC, document upload, OCR and instant eligibility checks.

features.title: AI Credit Scoring
features.desc: Rules + machine-learning scoring with credit bureau integration and customisable risk policies.

features.title: Approval Workflow
features.desc: Multi-tier approval, exception handling, role-based access and full audit log.

features.title: Disbursement
features.desc: Bank transfer integration, FPX/DuitNow, scheduled payouts, currency control.

features.title: Repayment & Collections
features.desc: Schedule generation, automated reminders (SMS/email/WhatsApp), online repayment, NPL tracking.

features.title: Admin Dashboard
features.desc: Real-time portfolio health, NPL ratios, collection KPIs and regulatory reports.

title: Driver & Transport Platform
tagline: Real-time dispatch, GPS tracking, route optimization and multi-city fleet operations.
longDescription: A complete ride-hailing / driver-for-hire / transport platform. Real-time GPS tracking, driver matching, route optimisation, dynamic pricing, in-app payments, ratings and a fleet admin console with city-level operations control.
iconSvg: <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 2a15 15 0 0 1 0 20M12 2a15 15 0 0 0 0 20M2 12h20"/></svg>

features.title: Real-time GPS Tracking
features.desc: Live driver and trip tracking on map with smooth interpolation and offline tolerance.

features.title: Driver Matching
features.desc: Geo-spatial driver matching with surge pricing, ETA estimation and re-assignment logic.

features.title: Route Optimisation
features.desc: Google Maps / Mapbox routing, multi-stop optimisation, traffic-aware ETAs.

features.title: In-app Payments
features.desc: Cashless trips, multiple payment methods, in-app wallet, automatic driver settlement.

features.title: Driver App
features.desc: Native driver app with online/offline mode, earnings, ratings, document upload.

features.title: Fleet Operations Console
features.desc: Multi-city control, driver onboarding, KYC, payouts, disputes and dashboards.

title: HRMS & Payroll System
tagline: Attendance, leave, payroll, claims and employee self-service built for Malaysian compliance.
longDescription: Complete HR and payroll management designed for Malaysian SMEs and enterprises. Attendance with mobile clock-in, leave with approval workflow, payroll with EPF/SOCSO/EIS/PCB calculations, expense claims, employee self-service portal and management dashboards.
iconSvg: <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M16 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M22 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/><path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/></svg>

features.title: Attendance & Time
features.desc: Mobile clock-in with geo-fencing, QR check-in, shift schedules and overtime tracking.

features.title: Leave Management
features.desc: Multi-type leave with quotas, approval chains, calendars, leave-balance dashboards.

features.title: Payroll Processing
features.desc: EPF, SOCSO, EIS, HRDF, PCB calculations, payslip PDF, bank file export, year-end forms.

features.title: Expense Claims
features.desc: Receipt upload, OCR, multi-level approval, reimbursement integration, audit trail.

features.title: Employee Self-Service
features.desc: View payslips, apply leave, submit claims, update profile and access training records.

features.title: Compliance Reports
features.desc: Form E, EA, CP8D, statutory submissions and LHDN e-invoicing ready.

title: ERP & Business Suite
tagline: Unified inventory, finance, procurement and operations dashboard for SMEs & enterprises.
longDescription: One unified ERP covering inventory, finance, procurement, sales, manufacturing and HR. Built on Odoo with custom modules — multi-company, multi-currency, multi-warehouse — and integrated with your accounting, e-commerce, payment and government e-invoicing systems.
iconSvg: <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>

features.title: Inventory & Warehouse
features.desc: Multi-warehouse stock, lot/batch tracking, expiry, transfers, cycle counts and barcode scanning.

features.title: Finance & Accounting
features.desc: GL, AR, AP, multi-currency, bank reconciliation, financial statements and audit trail.

features.title: Procurement
features.desc: Vendor management, RFQ, purchase orders, goods receipt and three-way matching.

features.title: Sales & CRM
features.desc: Quotations, sales orders, invoicing, customer portal and integrated CRM pipeline.

features.title: Manufacturing
features.desc: BOM, work orders, MRP, routing, quality control and shop-floor data capture.

features.title: E-Invoice (LHDN)
features.desc: Malaysian e-invoice integration with validation, archival and consolidated submission.

title: Legal Case Management
tagline: Cloud-based case tracking, document vault, invoicing and role-based access for law firms.
longDescription: Practice management for law firms — case files, document vault, time tracking, trust accounts, invoicing, calendar, role-based access and client portal. Built for hybrid and distributed teams with cloud-first architecture and granular permissions.
iconSvg: <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/><line x1="9" y1="13" x2="15" y2="13"/><line x1="9" y1="17" x2="15" y2="17"/></svg>

features.title: Case Management
features.desc: Full case file with parties, court dates, status, milestones and linked documents.

features.title: Document Vault
features.desc: Secure document store with versioning, OCR search, access control and audit log.

features.title: Time Tracking
features.desc: Billable hours by case and lawyer, with timesheet approval and invoice generation.

features.title: Invoicing & Trust
features.desc: Itemised invoices, trust account management, retainers, statements and online payments.

features.title: Calendar & Reminders
features.desc: Court dates, filing deadlines, auto-reminders, conflict checks across the firm.

features.title: Role-Based Access
features.desc: Granular permissions per role, case and document — partners, associates, paralegals.

title: Project Management Suite
tagline: Task, timeline, resource and budget management with live collaboration and reporting.
longDescription: End-to-end project management — Kanban boards, Gantt timelines, resource allocation, budget tracking, client portal and real-time collaboration. Built for agencies, contractors and project-driven teams that need more than off-the-shelf SaaS.
iconSvg: <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><line x1="16" y1="2" x2="16" y2="6"/><line x1="8" y1="2" x2="8" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="10" x2="21" y2="10"/></svg>

features.title: Tasks & Kanban
features.desc: Drag-drop kanban with checklists, comments, attachments, dependencies and watchers.

features.title: Gantt Timeline
features.desc: Interactive Gantt with milestones, critical path, baselines and progress tracking.

features.title: Resource Allocation
features.desc: Capacity planning, utilisation reports, conflict detection and team workload balancing.

features.title: Budget & Time
features.desc: Project budgets, cost categories, time logs, profitability by project and client.

features.title: Client Portal
features.desc: External client view of progress, milestones, deliverables, comments and approvals.

features.title: Reports & Dashboards
features.desc: Portfolio health, burn-down, velocity, profitability and custom dashboard widgets.

title: Feedback & BI Dashboard
tagline: Customer feedback collection with Power BI analytics for real-time decision making.
longDescription: Omni-channel feedback collection (QR, kiosk, SMS, email) fed into a Power BI / custom analytics layer. Sentiment analysis, NPS tracking, location-level dashboards, alerts on negative feedback and trend analysis across products, branches and time.
iconSvg: <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5"><line x1="18" y1="20" x2="18" y2="10"/><line x1="12" y1="20" x2="12" y2="4"/><line x1="6" y1="20" x2="6" y2="14"/></svg>

features.title: Multi-channel Capture
features.desc: QR codes, kiosks, SMS, email, web — feedback flows into one unified pipeline.

features.title: Sentiment Analysis
features.desc: NLP-driven sentiment + theme extraction so you see what customers care about.

features.title: Power BI Dashboards
features.desc: Out-of-the-box dashboards plus customisable views with branch / product / period filters.

features.title: Alerts & Routing
features.desc: Negative feedback triggers Slack / email / WhatsApp alerts to the right manager instantly.

features.title: NPS / CSAT Tracking
features.desc: Industry-standard scoring with longitudinal trends and benchmark comparisons.

features.title: Closed-loop Workflow
features.desc: Assign, follow up, resolve and report — turn complaints into measurable improvement.

title: Pet Services Platform
tagline: Booking, pet profiles, grooming, vet appointments and community marketplace.
longDescription: A complete platform for the pet care economy — pet profiles, grooming and boarding bookings, vet appointment scheduling, e-commerce marketplace for food and supplies, community forum and loyalty programme. iOS, Android and web with provider apps for groomers and clinics.

features.title: Pet Profiles
features.desc: Multiple pets per owner with medical records, vaccinations, allergies, photos and notes.

features.title: Grooming Bookings
features.desc: Browse groomers, view availability, book by service, pre-pay, reminders and reviews.

features.title: Vet Appointments
features.desc: Clinic listings, slot booking, video consults, prescriptions and follow-ups.

features.title: Marketplace
features.desc: Pet food, supplies and accessories e-commerce with delivery integration.

features.title: Provider App
features.desc: Groomers and clinics manage availability, bookings, customers and earnings.

features.title: Community & Loyalty
features.desc: Owner community, articles, badges and a loyalty rewards programme.

title: Wellness & Booking App
tagline: On-demand massage, spa and wellness booking with therapist matching and payments.
longDescription: On-demand and scheduled wellness bookings — massage, spa, beauty, fitness, yoga and more. Customer app, therapist/practitioner app, business admin console, in-app payments, ratings, location-based matching and recurring bookings.

features.title: Service Catalogue
features.desc: Configurable services with duration, pricing, prerequisites and category filters.

features.title: Therapist Matching
features.desc: Match by skill, distance, rating and availability — manual or automated.

features.title: Bookings & Recurrence
features.desc: One-off and recurring bookings, packages, cancellation rules and rescheduling.

features.title: In-app Payments
features.desc: Cards, wallet, packages, tipping, automatic therapist settlement.

features.title: Therapist App
features.desc: Schedule, navigation, customer notes, earnings, ratings, KYC and document upload.

features.title: Business Console
features.desc: Multi-outlet admin, staff onboarding, payouts, performance reports.

title: Supplier & Inventory System
tagline: Stock tracking, purchase orders, supplier portal and multi-warehouse management.
longDescription: Inventory and supplier management for distributors, e-commerce and multi-outlet retailers. Real-time stock across warehouses, purchase order workflows, supplier portal, barcode and lot tracking, demand forecasting and integrations with accounting and e-commerce.

features.title: Real-time Inventory
features.desc: Stock across warehouses and outlets, instant updates, transfer workflows, cycle counts.

features.title: Purchase Orders
features.desc: RFQ, PO generation, approval workflow, goods receipt and three-way matching.

features.title: Supplier Portal
features.desc: Suppliers log in to view POs, confirm delivery, upload invoices and respond to RFQs.

features.title: Barcode & Lot Tracking
features.desc: Barcode/QR scanning, batch and serial tracking, expiry alerts, FIFO/LIFO.

features.title: Demand Forecasting
features.desc: Sales-driven reorder points, auto-PO triggers, seasonality and trend analysis.

features.title: Integrations
features.desc: Sync with Shopify / WooCommerce / Lazada / Shopee / AutoCount / QuickBooks.

title: Visitor Management System
tagline: Digital check-in, QR passes, host notifications and security analytics for offices.
longDescription: Modern visitor management for offices, factories, schools and condos. Pre-registration, digital check-in via kiosk or QR, automatic host notifications, badge printing, NDA signing, blocklist screening and security analytics with full audit trail.
iconSvg: <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>

features.title: Pre-registration
features.desc: Invite visitors in advance with calendar integration, NDA pre-signing and pre-printed QR.

features.title: Kiosk Check-in
features.desc: Tablet kiosk for self-check-in with ID scan, photo capture and badge printing.

features.title: Host Notifications
features.desc: Instant WhatsApp / email / SMS / Slack notification to the host when their guest arrives.

features.title: NDA & Compliance
features.desc: Digital NDA / safety briefing signing, retained per visit, audit-ready.

features.title: Blocklist & Watchlist
features.desc: Block known names, flag VIPs, integrate with corporate security databases.

features.title: Security Analytics
features.desc: Visit volume, peak times, average duration, repeat-visit patterns and incident logs.

title: F&B & Retail POS
tagline: Point of sale, kitchen display, table order, loyalty and e-menu for restaurants & retail.
longDescription: Complete POS for restaurants and retail — multi-outlet, real-time inventory sync, kitchen display systems, QR table ordering, e-menu, customer loyalty, online ordering and integrated payment (cards, e-wallets, FPX, GrabPay, Boost, ShopeePay).
iconSvg: <svg width="72" height="72" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="9" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M1 1h4l2.68 13.39a2 2 0 0 0 2 1.61h9.72a2 2 0 0 0 2-1.61L23 6H6"/></svg>

features.title: Tablet & Desktop POS
features.desc: Fast tablet and desktop POS with split bills, table layout, modifiers and offline mode.

features.title: Kitchen Display (KDS)
features.desc: Real-time order routing to kitchen stations with course timing and order status.

features.title: QR Table Ordering
features.desc: Guests scan, browse e-menu, order, pay — no waiting, no staff bottleneck.

features.title: Inventory & Recipes
features.desc: Ingredient-level stock control, recipe management, auto-deduction with sales.

features.title: Loyalty & E-Wallet
features.desc: Member tiers, points, vouchers, push promos, integrated e-wallet for repeat business.

features.title: Payments
features.desc: Cards, FPX, DuitNow QR, GrabPay, Boost, ShopeePay, TnG, cash, split tender.
